epoch3_directives.cross_domain_naming: cross-domain queries MUST name BOTH domains' vocabulary (e.g. 'transcription factor cooperativity AND mixture-of-experts gating') to lift cross_domain_reach; scorer FIELD_LEX extended to detect the low-overlap domain
epoch3_directives.low_overlap_domain: AGENT 1 sources >=1 atom from a LOW-ML-overlap domain (geology/linguistics-phonology/materials-science/ecology), NOT biology/physics, to test: lower-overlap domain -> lower prior-art density -> candidate may clear Gate 1 (composite>=0.90)
